name: Threat Model JSON Evaluation Rubric
description: Evaluation criteria for threat-model.json files following the threat-model-spec schema.

categories.name: Schema Compliance

options.label: Pass
criteria: Passes JSON schema validation with no errors

options.label: Partial
criteria: Some optional fields missing that would add value

categories.evaluationPrompt: Validate the threat model against the schema. Check: (1) Does it pass schema validation? (2) Are all required fields present? (3) Are ID formats consistent?

categories.name: Asset Identification
categories.description: Complete identification of assets at risk

options.label: Pass
criteria: All assets identified including primary targets and secondary assets

options.label: Partial
criteria: Primary assets identified with correct classification
Some secondary assets may be missing

categories.evaluationPrompt: Check asset identification. Are all assets at risk identified? Are classifications appropriate? Is ownership specified?

categories.name: Attack Modeling
categories.description: Quality of attack chain, attack tree, and sequence modeling

options.label: Pass
criteria: Attack chain complete with all steps documented
Each step has MITRE tactic/technique mapping
Attack tree or sequence diagram present

options.label: Partial
criteria: Attack chain present but may have gaps

categories.evaluationPrompt: Evaluate attack modeling. Is the attack chain complete? Does each step have MITRE mappings? Are there attack trees or sequence diagrams?

categories.name: Mapping Accuracy
categories.description: Accuracy of CVE, CWE, MITRE ATT&CK, and OWASP mappings

options.label: Pass
criteria: CVSS vector is correct and parses

options.label: Partial
criteria: Minor omissions of relevant secondary mappings

categories.evaluationPrompt: Verify mapping accuracy. Do CVE details match NVD? Are CWEs root causes? Do MITRE techniques match the actual attack behaviors?

categories.name: Mitigation Quality
categories.evaluationPrompt: Evaluate mitigation quality. Do mitigations address all threats? Is status tracked? Are owners assigned?

categories.name: Diagram Integration
categories.description: Quality of embedded diagrams and consistency with threat model

options.label: Pass
criteria: Multiple diagram types present (DFD, attack-chain, sequence)
Element IDs consistent with threat model

categories.evaluationPrompt: Check diagram integration. Are diagrams present? Do element IDs match the threat model? Are trust boundaries marked?
